title: Phase
description: One phase of a walkable skill — the atomic unit of progress in the Lifecycle/Capability skill-walk (agency/skill.py + agency/capabilities/skills/_main.py; Spec 153 Slice 6 workflow-spine coverage). Links HAS_PHASE←Skill; PRECEDES next Phase.

skill.description: Name of the parent skill this phase belongs to.

index.description: Zero-based position of this phase within the skill's phase sequence.

produces.description: Artefact kinds this phase yields (list or comma-separated string).
